name: feishu-doc-toolbar
description: Obsidian Enhanced Experience — unified toolbar, templates, and utilities
author: lishu

scripts.sync:block-link-plus: cp ../block-link-plus/main.js src/modules/block-link-plus.bundle.js && cp ../block-link-plus/styles.css src/modules/block-link-plus.bundle.css && node scripts/verify-blp-bundle-patches.mjs
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && npm run build:claudian-test && NODE_PATH=./test-support node ./tests/block-link-plus-host.cjs && NODE_PATH=./test-support node ./tests/smoke.js && node ./tests/embedded-blp-boot.cjs && node ./tests/embedded-blp-bundle-only.cjs
scripts.test:embedded-blp: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('main.js','utf8');if(!s.includes('require_block_link_plus_bundle')){process.exit(1)};if(s.includes('require(\"./block-link-plus.bundle.js\")')){process.exit(1)};console.log('embedded-blp build OK')"
